This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). 2026-04-02T05:55:04.1778042Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-02T05:55:04.1778588Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-02T05:55:04.1778762Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-02T05:55:04.1779002Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
